# TideSurf

> The connector between Chromium and LLM agents — no screenshots, no vision models, just the DOM compressed for machines.

TideSurf launches Chrome via CDP, walks the live DOM, and compresses it into token-efficient XML (100–800 tokens per page vs 5,000–50,000+ for raw HTML). Interactive elements get stable IDs (L=link, B=button, I=input, S=select) so agents can act on them. Ships with 18 tool definitions and an MCP adapter.

## Install

```
bun add @tidesurf/core
```

## Quick Start

```typescript
import { TideSurf } from "@tidesurf/core";

// Launch a new browser
const browser = await TideSurf.launch();

// Or connect to an already-running Chrome (re-use logged-in sessions)
// const browser = await TideSurf.connect({ port: 9222 });

// Or read-only mode (observe but don't interact)
// const browser = await TideSurf.launch({ readOnly: true });

await browser.navigate("https://example.com");

const state = await browser.getState();
console.log(state.xml);

// Output modes
await browser.getState({ mode: "interactive" }); // only clickable elements
await browser.getState({ mode: "minimal" });     // landmarks + summaries
await browser.getState({ viewport: true });       // visible viewport only

const page = browser.getPage();
await page.click("B1");
await page.type("I1", "hello world");
await page.search("login");
const img = await page.screenshot();

await browser.close();
```

## Tools (18)

### Page interaction
- `get_state` — compressed XML (optional `maxTokens`, `viewport`, `mode`)
- `navigate` — go to a URL
- `click` — click element by ID
- `type` — type into input by ID
- `select` — pick dropdown option
- `scroll` — scroll up/down
- `extract` — extract text via CSS selector
- `evaluate` — run JavaScript in page context
- `search` — find text on the page with context
- `screenshot` — capture viewport, full page, or element as PNG
- `upload` — upload file to file input
- `download` — click download link and capture the file
- `clipboard_read` — read clipboard
- `clipboard_write` — write to clipboard

### Tab management
- `list_tabs` — list open tabs
- `new_tab` — open new tab
- `switch_tab` — switch to tab by ID
- `close_tab` — close tab by ID

## MCP

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "tidesurf": {
      "command": "bunx",
      "args": ["tidesurf", "mcp"]
    }
  }
}
```

Auto-connect to your running Chrome:

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "tidesurf": {
      "command": "bunx",
      "args": ["tidesurf", "mcp", "--auto-connect"]
    }
  }
}
```

Read-only mode:

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "tidesurf": {
      "command": "bunx",
      "args": ["tidesurf", "mcp", "--auto-connect", "--read-only"]
    }
  }
}
```

## CLI

```
bunx tidesurf inspect <url>                              # print compressed XML
bunx tidesurf inspect <url> --auto-connect               # use running Chrome
bunx tidesurf mcp                                        # start MCP server
bunx tidesurf mcp --auto-connect                         # MCP with running Chrome
bunx tidesurf mcp --auto-connect --read-only             # observe only
bunx tidesurf mcp --auto-connect --port 9333             # custom CDP port
```

## Links

- Docs: https://tidesurf.org/docs
- GitHub: https://github.com/TideSurf/core
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@tidesurf/core
